questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно располагает наречия по порядку: частота → способ → место → время?

choices.text: She often writes quickly at the office in the morning.
She often writes at the office quickly in the morning.
She writes quickly often at the office in the morning.
She writes at the office quickly often in the morning.

questions.explanation: Порядок наречий: частота → способ → место → время. В правильном варианте "often" (частота), "quickly" (способ), "at the office" (место), "in the morning" (время).

questions.prompt: Какое предложение соответствует правилу порядка наречий: частота → способ → место → время?

choices.text: They always play loudly in the park every day.
They always play in the park loudly every day.
They play loudly always in the park every day.
They play in the park loudly always every day.

questions.explanation: Правильный порядок: частота (always), способ (loudly), место (in the park), время (every day).

questions.prompt: Выберите предложение с верным порядком наречий: частота → способ → место → время.

choices.text: He usually drives slowly on the highway at night.
He usually drives on the highway slowly at night.
He drives slowly usually on the highway at night.
He drives on the highway slowly usually at night.

questions.explanation: Порядок: частота (usually), способ (slowly), место (on the highway), время (at night).

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит наречия в правильном порядке: частота → способ → место → время?

choices.text: She rarely sings beautifully in the choir every Sunday.
She rarely sings in the choir beautifully every Sunday.
She sings beautifully rarely in the choir every Sunday.
She sings in the choir beautifully rarely every Sunday.

questions.explanation: Правильный порядок: частота (rarely), способ (beautifully), место (in the choir), время (every Sunday).

questions.prompt: Укажите предложение, где наречия расположены по правилу: частота → способ → место → время.

choices.text: They frequently eat well at home in the evening.
They frequently eat at home well in the evening.
They eat well frequently at home in the evening.
They eat at home well frequently in the evening.

questions.explanation: Порядок: частота (frequently), способ (well), место (at home), время (in the evening).

questions.prompt: Какой вариант соответствует порядку наречий: частота → способ → место → время?

choices.text: We always meet quickly at the cafe in the morning.
We always meet at the cafe quickly in the morning.
We meet quickly always at the cafe in the morning.

questions.explanation: Правильный порядок: частота (always), способ (quickly), место (at the cafe), время (in the morning).

questions.prompt: Выберите предложение с правильным расположением наречий: частота → способ → место → время.

choices.text: He seldom works efficiently in the office during the day.
He seldom works in the office efficiently during the day.
He works efficiently seldom in the office during the day.
He works in the office efficiently seldom during the day.

questions.explanation: Порядок: частота (seldom), способ (efficiently), место (in the office), время (during the day).

questions.prompt: Какой вариант содержит наречия в порядке: частота → способ → место → время?

choices.text: She usually reads attentively in the library every evening.
She usually reads in the library attentively every evening.
She reads attentively usually in the library every evening.
She reads in the library attentively usually every evening.

questions.explanation: Правильный порядок: частота (usually), способ (attentively), место (in the library), время (every evening).

choices.text: They sometimes travel comfortably by train in the summer.

They travel comfortably sometimes by train in the summer.

questions.explanation: Порядок: частота (sometimes), способ (comfortably), место (by train), время (in the summer).
